title: It’s Cool to Be a Banker Again After a Red-Hot Earnings Quarter
title_cn: 在经历了炙手可热的盈利季度后再次成为一名银行家真是太酷了
summary: Also: Germany steps aside in the UniCredit-Commerzbank contest

title: Apollo Bets on Mexico With $20 Billion Target for Private Credit
title_cn: Apollo 押注墨西哥 200 亿美元私人信贷目标
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. plans to put as much as $20 billion to work financing projects in Mexico as the giant asset manager seeks new outlets for its private credit business.

title: Balbec Secures $930 Million in Commitments for Asset-Based Credit Fund
title_cn: Balbec 获得 9.3 亿美元的资产信贷基金承诺
summary: Alternative asset manager Balbec Capital LP has obtained commitments of more than $930 million for its latest flagship fund that will invest in a variety of asset-based credit, according to a filing on Thursday.

title: Paschi Casts Doubts On Intesa Bid, Urges Studying BPM Plan
title_cn: Paschi 对 Intesa 竞标表示怀疑，敦促研究 BPM 计划
summary: Banca Monte dei Paschi di Siena SpA expressed broad concerns over a takeover bid by Intesa Sanpaolo SpA while highlighting perceived benefits in a rough rival pitch presented by Banco BPM SpA.

title: Chip Stocks Hit by AI Spending Worries After Rally: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 芯片股在反弹后受到人工智能支出担忧的打击：市场结束
summary: A selloff in chipmakers dragged down stocks amid concerns over whether massive artificial-intelligence investments will justify lofty valuations, with a resurgence in geopolitical risks also weighing on sentiment.

title: Oil Traders Crowd Around Cheap TACO Hedge as Iran War Escalates
title_cn: 随着伊朗战争升级，石油交易商纷纷围观廉价的 TACO 对冲
summary: An unusual options trade is becoming a favored hedge against the risks of sudden U-turns in US President Donald Trump’s stance on Iran, a dynamic that has repeatedly whipsawed markets in recent months.

title: Podcast: Tokenization, Digital Twins and the Future of ETFs
title_cn: 播客：代币化、数字孪生和 ETF 的未来
summary: On this episode of Trillions, we explore how this government transformation will affect stocks, bonds and exchange-traded funds.

title: Turning Oil to Fuel Has Never Been More Profitable as Refining Margins Surge
title_cn: 随着炼油利润飙升，将石油转化为燃料从未如此有利可图
summary: Profit margins for US refiners making gasoline and diesel from crude oil are shattering records, as fuel supply disruptions driven by war lift prices for refined products.

title: Citi Traders Pitch Shorting French Shipping Giant CMA CGM Bonds
title_cn: 花旗交易员卖空法国航运巨头达飞轮船 (CMA CGM) 债券
summary: Citigroup’s credit traders and analysts are recommending their hedge fund clients short bonds issued by French shipping giant CMA CGM Group, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Latest Oil Market News and Analysis for July 16
title_cn: 7 月 16 日最新石油市场新闻和分析
summary: Oil steadied, largely holding onto a run of gains with concerns mounting about disruptions to flows from the Middle East as US strikes against Iran intensify.

title: Chevron to Sign Oil Investment Accords With Iraq on Friday
title_cn: 雪佛龙将于周五与伊拉克签署石油投资协议
summary: Chevron Corp. expects to sign accords with Iraq on Friday that will advance its negotiations about investing in large oil fields, according to a senior company executive.

title: European Stocks Post Small Gains After a Day of Volatile Trading
title_cn: 经过一天的波动交易后，欧洲股市小幅上涨
summary: European stocks recouped the day’s declines to end modestly higher, with investors monitoring renewed geopolitical risks. ABB Ltd. fell 5.9% after a deal to buy British industrial components maker Rotork Plc.

title: Ladbrokes Owner Entain to Cut 2% of Staff as UK Taxes Hit
title_cn: 英国税收打击立博老板拟裁员 2%
summary: Entain Plc will cut 500 jobs, or about 2% of its global workforce, as the gambling industry grapples with higher UK taxes, tighter regulation and growing competition from prediction markets.

title: Multistrat Hedge Fund Paloma to Cut Teams in Latest Pivot
title_cn: Multistrat 对冲基金 Paloma 将在最新转型中裁员
summary: Donald Sussman, the veteran behind Paloma Partners, is pivoting his long-standing multistrategy hedge fund to focus on fewer managers in which he has the highest conviction as the firm adjusts to a decline in assets over the past three years.

title: India’s Maruti to Fight Order to Replace Car Over Ethanol Damage
title_cn: 印度马鲁蒂公司将抵制因乙醇损坏而更换汽车的命令
summary: Maruti Suzuki India Ltd. said it will challenge a consumer court order asking the nation’s largest carmaker to replace a vehicle over alleged damage from ethanol-blended fuel, a case that assumes significance as the debate over the nation’s biofuel push intensifies.

title: Wheat Wavers After Touching Two-Year High Amid Black Sea Strikes
title_cn: 黑海袭击导致小麦触及两年高位后波动
summary: Wheat fluctuated after touching a two-year high as traders weighed ongoing Ukrainian and Russian strikes in the Black Sea and weak US export data.

title: Aston Martin Creditors Tap Jefferies as Debt Worries Grow
title_cn: 随着债务担忧加剧，阿斯顿·马丁债权人选择杰弗里斯
summary: A group of creditors to Aston Martin Lagonda Global Holdings Plc have picked Jefferies Financial Group Inc. as financial adviser as concern over the debt of the distressed British automaker grows, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Bank of America Exits Chicago Plan to Sell Overdue Parking Debt
title_cn: 美国银行退出芝加哥出售逾期停车债务的计划
summary: Bank of America is no longer working with Chicago on the sale of debt owed to the city from fines and fees, and officials have been unable to advance the deal so far this year, according to the mayor’s office.

title: Bond Traders Bail on Fed Hike Wagers on Softer Inflation Outlook
title_cn: 债券交易员因通胀前景疲软而加息美联储押注
summary: The bullish tone in the US bond market following two benign inflation reports has traders of interest-rate options scrambling to exit positions bought in anticipation of at least one increase by the Federal Reserve this year.

title: What Nigeria Stocks Tell Investors About Africa Markets: Live Q&A
title_cn: 尼日利亚股票告诉投资者有关非洲市场的信息：现场问答
summary: Bloomberg reporters answer your questions about Nigeria’s world-beating stocks, and where investors are finding opportunities in African markets, in a Live Q&A on Friday, July 17 at 12 p.m. GMT

title: Gold Falls as US-Iran Hostilities Rekindles Fed Hike Bets
title_cn: 美国与伊朗的敌对行动重燃美联储加息押注，金价下跌
summary: Gold declined as escalating tensions in the Middle East rekindled expectations that the Federal Reserve may need to hike interest rates to contain stubborn inflation.

title: Digi Spanish Unit Shares Close Lower After €287 Million IPO
title_cn: Digi 西班牙单位股价在 2.87 亿欧元首次公开募股后收盘下跌
summary: Digi Spain Telecom SA shares closed lower in their debut in Spain on Thursday, after a rare initial public offering in the country.

title: Ryan Cohen Vows GameStop Will Pursue eBay Despite Offer Being Rebuffed
title_cn: 瑞安·科恩 (Ryan Cohen) 誓言 GameStop 将收购 eBay，尽管报价遭到拒绝
summary: GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen declined to say if he planned to raise his $56 billion offer for online auctioneer eBay Inc., but said “we’re coming for eBay one way or another.”

title: Verizon Cuts Store Workers in Reorganization Strategy
title_cn: Verizon 在重组战略中裁员
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. announced a round of layoffs Thursday that will impact about 3,000 employees in corporate-owned retail stores, the latest move in new Chief Executive Officer Dan Schulman’s plan to transform the mobile provider.

title: Palm Beach Rejects Data Center Near Trump’s Mar-a-Lago Club
title_cn: 棕榈滩拒绝特朗普海湖庄园附近的数据中心
summary: Palm Beach County commissioners rejected a proposal late Wednesday to build a digital infrastructure hub to house AI data centers and warehouses, voting in line with the ardent opposition from local residents.

title: Nasdaq 100 Slides 1.4% as TSMC Results Revive Concerns Around AI
title_cn: 台积电业绩重燃人们对人工智能的担忧，纳斯达克 100 指数下跌 1.4%
summary: US stocks declined on Thursday as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s results failed to boost artificial-intelligence stocks and traders assessed a worsening situation in the Middle East.

title: Oracle Risks Falling Behind in AI Race as Spending Binge Bites
title_cn: 由于支出狂潮，甲骨文面临在人工智能竞赛中落后的风险
summary: Oracle Corp.’s ambitions to dominate the artificial intelligence buildout are running into a key hurdle: funding a spending spree without further damaging its credit standing.

title: Hollywood Sci-Fi Lot Pitched as Site to Make Real Space-Age Weapons
title_cn: 好莱坞科幻片被定位为制造真正太空时代武器的场地
summary: Manhattan Beach Studios has been the site of filming for projects including Stars Wars: The Mandalorian, a TV series about a heavily armed bounty hunter in a galaxy far, far away.

title: Carney Taps General Dynamics for $1.4 Billion Canada Armored Vehicle Deal
title_cn: 卡尼与通用动力公司签订价值 14 亿美元的加拿大装甲车交易
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney announced the Canadian government is earmarking C$2 billion ($1.4 billion) over four years to build armored combat support vehicles in southwestern Ontario.

title: Visa Is Expanding Its Crypto Push With New Stablecoin Platform
title_cn: Visa 正在通过新的稳定币平台扩大其加密货币业务
summary: Visa Inc. unveiled a platform that lets financial firms issue, move and manage stablecoins, broadening the payments giant’s crypto offerings as banks and fintechs prepare for wider adoption of the digital tokens.

title: China-Led AI Body Enlists Global South States to Rival US
title_cn: 中国领导的人工智能机构邀请全球南方国家与美国竞争
summary: Twenty-nine countries including Russia have signed up to join the China-led World Artificial Intelligence Cooperation Organization, as Beijing’s plan to jostle with the US for influence over the emergence of artificial intelligence begins to take shape.

title: Sea Drone Maker Saronic to Build New Shipyard in South Texas
title_cn: 海上无人机制造商 Saronic 将在德克萨斯州南部建造新造船厂
summary: An Austin-based technology startup whose maritime drones were used by the US military in combat for the first time this week plans to build a $3.2 billion shipyard in South Texas.

title: Apple Nears Launch of OLED iPad Mini; New iPad Air and Base iPad in 2027
title_cn: 苹果即将推出 OLED iPad Mini； 2027 年新款 iPad Air 和 Base iPad
summary: Apple Inc. is preparing to introduce its biggest overhaul to the iPad mini in half a decade, giving new life to a product that’s popular with travelers and technology enthusiasts.

title: Uber Agrees to Buy Delivery Hero in $14.8 Billion Deal
title_cn: Uber 同意以 148 亿美元收购 Delivery Hero
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. has agreed to buy Delivery Hero SE in a deal that values the German food-delivery company at $14.8 billion and expands the US firm’s global operations.

title: Travel Agency Platform Fora Valued at $1 Billion in New Funding
title_cn: 旅行社平台 Fora 新融资估值达 10 亿美元
summary: Fora, an online platform for travel agents, has raised $60 million in funding at a $1 billion valuation, with the goal of adding artificial intelligence tools to help travel advisers accelerate their businesses.

title: Google Must Give Gemini Rivals Equal Access to Android System, EU Says
title_cn: 欧盟称谷歌必须给予 Gemini 竞争对手平等的 Android 系统访问权限
summary: Google faces a European Union directive to open up its Android operating system to artificial intelligence rivals for certain features and give search data to competing online engine providers.

title: Franklin Templeton Cuts AI Bets, Favors Chinese Internet Stocks
title_cn: 富兰克林邓普顿削减人工智能押注，青睐中国互联网股票
summary: Franklin Templeton’s main emerging equity fund has scaled back on memory chipmakers’ shares after their huge rally, instead favoring Chinese internet names such as Alibaba Group Holding Ltd and Tencent Holdings Ltd.

title: CXMT’s Blockbuster IPO 212 Times Covered for Retail Investors
title_cn: 长鑫存储重磅IPO 212次覆盖散户投资者
summary: The marquee listing of CXMT Corp. ignited a rush among retail investors as China’s homegrown memory giant opened books for an initial public offering to raise $9.8 billion, the second-largest in the nation’s history.

title: Japan to Buy Nvidia Rubin Chips to Build an AI for Robots
title_cn: 日本将购买 Nvidia Rubin 芯片来构建机器人人工智能
summary: Japan is planning to buy 27,500 next-generation Rubin chips from Nvidia Corp. to build a homegrown foundational AI model for robots.

title: AI Sales Start to Justify Data Center Spending: Report
title_cn: 人工智能销售开始证明数据中心支出的合理性：报告
summary: Revenue from artificial intelligence has reached a tipping point, showing that the hundreds of billions of dollars tech companies are spending on it may be economically sustainable, according to a report from research firm Exponential View.

title: AI Companion Bots and Virtual Lovers Face China Crackdown
title_cn: 人工智能伴侣机器人和虚拟恋人面临中国打压
summary: Beijing is shunning virtual lovers, which had grown into a popular social substitute

title: Dark Ships and Oman Transfers Indicate Hormuz Transits Continue
title_cn: 黑船和阿曼转运表明霍尔木兹转运仍在继续
summary: A handful of oil tankers were seen conducting ship-to-ship transfers off the coast of Oman, a sign that ships are continuing to sail through the Strait of Hormuz before offloading their cargoes onto other vessels after recent Iranian attacks.

title: Deadly ICE Shooting Jolts Already Chaotic Maine Senate Race
title_cn: 致命的 ICE 枪击事件扰乱了已经混乱的缅因州参议院竞选
summary: The Maine Senate race has been jolted yet again after the fatal shooting of a Colombian man by a federal agent this week, galvanizing Democrats against President Donald Trump’s immigration crackdown.

title: US Student Visa Holders Face New Restrictions Under DHS Rule
title_cn: 美国学生签证持有者面临国土安全部规则的新限制
summary: The Trump administration is scrapping a decades-old policy that allows international students and exchange visitors to remain in the US for as long as their studies last, replacing it with a four-year limit that will require many of them to seek federal permission to stay.

title: Zelenskyy Aims to Contain Anger Over Defense Minister Ouster
title_cn: 泽伦斯基旨在遏制对国防部长罢免的愤怒
summary: Volodymyr Zelenskyy said the ousted Ukrainian defense minister remained part of his team even as Mykhailo Fedorov insisted he’d turned down a position as a presidential adviser, deepening a rift within the country’s ruling elite at a pivotal moment in the war against Russia.

title: Hungary Probing Ex-Foreign Minister’s Russia Ties, Magyar Says
title_cn: 马扎尔称匈牙利正在调查前外交部长与俄罗斯的关系
summary: Hungarian Prime Minister Peter Magyar said an investigation is underway into former foreign minister Peter Szijjarto’s ties to Russia.

title: Vance Stokes Clash With Senate Over Trump Voter ID Legislation
title_cn: 万斯因特朗普选民身份立法与参议院发生冲突
summary: Vice President JD Vance publicly urged Republicans to attach White House-backed voter identification legislation to a partisan bill funding the Iran war, ramping up the administration’s election push just hours before President Donald Trump is expected to try to cast fresh doubt the 2020 vote he lost.

title: Iran-US Hostilities Worsen as Hormuz Shipping Traffic Falls
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡航运量下降，伊朗与美国的敌对行动加剧
summary: The US intensified strikes against Iran overnight, hitting an oil tanker near the country’s main export terminal as shipping traffic slumped through the critical Strait of Hormuz.

title: Trump, GOP Amass $1.1 Billion to Battle Democrats in Midterms
title_cn: 特朗普和共和党筹集 11 亿美元在中期选举中对抗民主党
summary: President Donald Trump and his Republican allies have amassed a $1.1 billion war chest ahead of the midterm elections, more than triple the amount of cash that the national Democratic Party has, according to the latest Federal Election Commission disclosures.

title: US 25% Tariffs on Brazil Risk Becoming an Election Gift to Lula
title_cn: 美国对巴西征收 25% 关税有可能成为送给卢拉的选举礼物
summary: The US decision to impose 25% tariffs on Brazil has reignited a trade dispute with President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva’s government just months before October’s presidential election, potentially shaping the outcome of a deeply polarized race.

title: Iraq Says Basrah Oil Loadings Continue After Tanker Incident
title_cn: 伊拉克称油轮事件后巴士拉石油装载仍在继续
summary: Iraq said it continues to load oil onto tankers at its Basrah export installations in the Persian Gulf and that no damage had been sustained to a vessel while it loaded there.

title: Mahmood’s Economic ‘Blank Slate’ Key to Appeal as UK Chancellor
title_cn: 马哈茂德的经济“空白”成为英国财政大臣上诉的关键
summary: UK Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood’s edge over Energy Secretary Ed Miliband in the race to be appointed Andy Burnham’s Chancellor of the Exchequer appears to lie in one important quality: economically, she’s a blank slate.

title: Reid Hoffman Pumps $10 Million Into Talarico’s Senate Bid
title_cn: 里德·霍夫曼 (Reid Hoffman) 斥资 1000 万美元参与塔拉里科 (Talarico) 参议员竞选

title: UK Aims to Send Ukraine Pared-Down Ballistic Missile in 2027
title_cn: 英国计划于 2027 年向乌克兰发射精简版弹道导弹
summary: The UK has signed contracts with multiple companies to develop the country’s first ballistic missile in more than half a century in a bid to both support Ukraine and reduce Europe’s reliance on American weaponry.

title: India Court Voids Visa Services Tenders in Australia, Singapore
title_cn: 印度法院撤销澳大利亚和新加坡的签证服务招标
summary: An Indian court has scrapped the government’s tender for outsourcing passport, visa and consular services at diplomatic missions in four countries, including Australia and Singapore, as two losing bidders argued the selection process wasn’t fair.

title: Dario Amodei, Anthropic Employees Give Millions to Regulate AI
title_cn: Dario Amodei，Anthropic 员工捐赠数百万美元来监管人工智能
summary: Anthropic PBC Chief Executive Officer Dario Amodei and five other employees of the company gave more than $2 million to a super political action committee focused on regulating artificial intelligence, boosting the AI safety movement’s war chest in this year’s midterm elections.

title: Meloni Wins Lower House Backing for Electoral Reform Bill
title_cn: 梅洛尼赢得下议院对选举改革法案的支持
summary: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni overcame government infighting to win lower house approval for an Italian electoral-reform bill that has been one of her top legislative priorities.

title: UK Urges FIFA to Investigate Argentina’s Falklands Banner
title_cn: 英国敦促国际足联调查阿根廷福克兰群岛旗帜
summary: The UK government has called on football’s governing body FIFA to investigate whether the Argentinian team breached its rules by waving a banner in support of their country’s claim to the Falkland Islands after defeating England in the World Cup semi-finals.

title: Finnish Premier Asks Parliament to Convene as Scandal Flares Up
title_cn: 丑闻爆发，芬兰总理要求议会召开会议
summary: Finland’s Prime Minister Petteri Orpo asked the speaker of parliament to reconvene the Nordic nation’s legislature in the middle of its summer break as a simmering political crisis flared up.

title: Maine, Texas ICE Shootings Add to GOP Midterm Pressures
title_cn: 缅因州和德克萨斯州 ICE 枪击事件增加了共和党中期压力
summary: The agency is again dominating headlines in two states hosting critical Senate races.

title: Xi Scores a Soft-Power Win Over Trump as Pew Survey Shows China Gain on US
title_cn: 皮尤调查显示中国领先美国，习近平软实力战胜特朗普
summary: Pew survey shows people view China more positively than the US for the first time in almost 20 years.
